summary: Monday strategy audit, both accounts flat, kill-switches armed/untripped, engine-health YELLOW (only a stale TV watchdog node, non-critical, market closed). Two LIVE entry strategies on Safe-2 (vwap_continuation, gap_and_go) plus the legacy BEARISH_REJECTION/BULLISH_RECLAIM rubric. Risky-2 has NO vwap_continuation wiring (enabled key ABSENT in aggressive params + block not in aggressive heartbeat) so it runs only the legacy rubric. Critical Monday gate: every recency-gated edge is RED or YELLOW (#1 vwap_continuation ATM AND ITM-2 both RED on the trailing-25d window) -> recency_check HOLD is correct, NO dormant flips Monday. Dormant edges (#2 vwap_reclaim_failed_break, #4 vix_regime_dayside, WP-5 strike override, WP-8 1DTE+dollar-stop) are all wired flag-OFF and correctly gated by the RED recency state. No doctrine violations found; all firing setups map to named playbook patterns.

strategies.name: vwap_continuation (J_VWAP_CONT)

recent_performance.note: Trailing 25d (2026-05-14..06-18) ATM RED: exp -$22.46/tr, 1 win-day of 10. Full-2026-OOS POSITIVE: exp +$47.55/tr n=50. Live tier is OTM-2-leak (recency exp -$9.73, full-OOS +$18.36). Recency RED is a ~2.2sigma regime drawdown per prior session note, not stop/gate-fixable.

risk_flags: recency RED -> no capital scaling until CONFIRM (recency_check gate holding correctly)
LIVE tier fires the OTM-2 weakest cell -> WP-5 strike-leak (~$3,431/yr) is dormant flag-OFF, blocked by RED recency
strategies.action: HOLD live as-is. Do NOT flip WP-5 strike-override or WP-8 1DTE+dollar-stop while recency RED. Re-run recency_check after next fills accrue; flip the queued WP-5/WP-8 upgrades only on CONFIRM.

risk_flags: not covered by the weekly recency_check tracker -> add it so this LIVE edge also gets the recency gate
strategies.action: Keep live (put-only, OP-16-compliant). Add gap_and_go to recency-confirmation.json so the only un-tracked LIVE edge gets weekly recency coverage.

strategies.name: vix_regime_dayside (edge #4)
doctrine_flags: No named playbook pattern -- detector wired flag-gated OFF (inert), not a violation. Needs playbook entry before any live flip (Rule 1).

risk_flags: STRUCTURAL: needs an intraday VIX series (median-78 + slope-5) the live BarContext does NOT carry by default -> detector reads optional ctx.vix_intraday and SKIPS when absent, so block stays inert until the feed threads VIX series in. This is the real blocker, not the flag.
block wired in Safe heartbeat only (correct -- ATM-only edge per C29)
strategies.action: Keep DORMANT. The flag is not the blocker -- the live VIX-intraday feed is. Quick win candidate: thread an intraday VIX series into BarContext so the detector can actually evaluate live. Until then it can never fire even if flag flipped.

prioritized_issues: CRITICAL-readiness: every recency-gated edge is RED (#1 ATM + ITM-2) or YELLOW (#2, #4). recency_check HOLD is correct -> NO dormant flips Monday. The #1 live edge is in a ~2.2sigma recency drawdown (regime tail, not decay).
HIGH: vix_bear_hard_cap (23.0) params doc says 'heartbeat.md activation pending' -- possible params/code drift (kill-switch class). Verify the bear-VIX filter is actually wired before open.
HIGH: 6/18 Bold BULLISH_RECLAIM had a MISSING broker stop leg (simple order filled, position unmanaged) -- atomic-bracket integrity regression (C11/L47/L76) to confirm is fixed.
MEDIUM: vix_regime_dayside (#4) can NEVER fire live even if flag-flipped -- the live BarContext does not thread an intraday VIX series; detector skips. The real blocker is the feed, not the flag.
MEDIUM: gap_and_go is LIVE but NOT in the weekly recency_check tracker -- the only un-gated live edge.

LOW: Risky-2 runs ONLY the legacy BEARISH/BULLISH rubric -- vwap_continuation enabled-key is ABSENT in aggressive params AND the block is not in the aggressive heartbeat. Bold is missing the validated near-daily edge entirely.
quick_wins: Add gap_and_go to recency-confirmation.json so all LIVE edges get weekly recency coverage (no code, ~one tracker edit).
Verify/wire vix_bear_hard_cap filter in heartbeat.md (params doc flags it pending) -- closes a potential drift.

Thread an intraday VIX series (median-78 + slope-5) into the live BarContext so vix_regime_dayside (#4) becomes evaluable -- unblocks a YELLOW-positive edge from a structural dead-end (it is currently un-fireable regardless of flag).
monday_readiness_reason: Both accounts flat, kill-switches armed/untripped, positions clean. LIVE strategies are validated (OOS-positive + regime gates wired), so the floor is GREEN. NOT GREEN because: (1) the #1 live edge (vwap_continuation) is recency RED -- correctly held by recency_check, no scaling/flips -- but it means the primary money-maker is bleeding in the current regime; (2) two HIGH integrity items unverified (vix_bear_hard_cap activation-pending drift; 6/18 missing-stop-leg bracket bug). No kill-switch proximity and no doctrine violation, so YELLOW not RED. Action stance: trade the validated live stack unchanged, flip NOTHING dormant, fix the two HIGH integrity checks before open.
